title: juncus tenuis subsp. bicornis
intro: Juncus tenuis subsp. bicornis, also known as two-horned rush or jointed rush, is a plant species belonging to the family Juncaceae. Traditionally, Juncus tenuis subsp. bicornis has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections and kidney stones. Juncus tenuis subsp. bicornis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, but more research is required to confirm its efficacy and safety.
